title: The Dark Connection Between UFOs and Nukes
summary: A brief overview discussing the documented connection between UFO sightings and US nuclear facilities, referencing a 1949 declassified Air Force document about an emergency conference and a book compiling over 100 interviews with nuclear facility employees who witnessed UFOs.

acronyms.definition: Long-range nuclear missiles capable of traveling between continents

organizations_mentioned: Air Force Office of Special Investigations

events.description: Emergency conference held at Camp Hood Texas involving Air Force Office of Special Investigations, Army Counter Intelligence Command, and FBI to discuss frequent UFO sightings around American nuclear facilities

key_claims.claim: Every single nuclear base in the United States has been visited by UFOs
A declassified Air Force document reveals an emergency conference was held in 1949 at Camp Hood Texas to discuss UFO sightings around nuclear facilities
The book 'UFOs and Nukes' compiles over 100 interviews with nuclear employees who claimed to have seen or interacted with UFOs around nuclear sites
